name: Brown Rice Muffins
recipeIngredient: 1 cup brown rice, cooked and cooled
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the cooked, cooled brown rice with skim milk in a large bowl.
2. Add the beaten egg whites (or substitute) and stir until combined.
3. Stir in honey and vanilla extract.
4. Gradually mix in the cinnamon, whole wheat flour, and baking powder until just moistened.
5. Grease non-stick muffin pans or lightly spray with cooking spray.
6. Pour batter into prepared muffin cups.
7. Bake at 400°F (200°C) for 25-30 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean.
